examples: Use something for (doing) — Utilize something for a purpose
Use something to do... — Utilize something to achieve an action
It's / there's no use doing... — Doing something is pointless

questions.sentence: Choose the correct collocation: _____ something for (doing)
options: B) It's / there's no use doing...

questions.sentence: Choose the correct collocation: _____ something to do...
options: C) It's / there's no use doing...

questions.sentence: Choose the correct collocation: It's / there's no use doing...
options: B) It's / there's no use doing...

questions.sentence: Choose the correct collocation: Of (no) use
options: D) It's / there's no use doing...
